name: kargha
description: Stack-agnostic frontend pipeline: turn a Claude Design OR runtime-JSX design prototype into vertical-slice tickets, implemented frontend code, and visual fidelity validation.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, build, and validate frontend slices from design prototypes.
interface.longDescription: kargha packages three stack-agnostic frontend skills: plan vertical-slice tickets from a Claude Design OR runtime-JSX design export, build one ticket in an isolated worktree, and validate the running view against the design prototype.
defaultPrompt: Plan frontend tickets from this design.
Validate this running view against the design.
